title: PROGRAM_REGISTRY.json
text:
{
  "schema": "skinharmony_program_registry_v1",
  "updated_at": "2026-05-24T17:45:00+02:00",
  "rule": "Ogni programma deve avere PROGRAM.md, ARCHITECTURE.md, USER_MANUAL.md e OPERATIONS.md aggiornati quando cambia comportamento, architettura, server/runtime, UI, API, vendita o workflow.",
  "programs": [
    {
      "id": "suite",
      "name": "SkinHarmony Site Suite",
      "path": "SHARED_MEMORY/programs/suite",
      "owned_paths": [
        "wordpress/plugins/skinharmony-site-suite",
        "dist/skinharmony-site-suite",
        "reports/site-suite",
        "reports/wordpress"
      ],
      "server_runtime": [
        "WordPress plugin",
        "WooCommerce",
        "Render via API/manifest/update server quando configurato"
      ],
      "required_docs": ["PROGRAM.md", "ARCHITECTURE.md", "USER_MANUAL.md", "OPERATIONS.md"]
    },
    {
      "id": "skinharmony-core",
      "name": "SkinHarmony Translation Hub",
      "path": "SHARED_MEMORY/programs/skinharmony-core",
      "owned_paths": [
        "wordpress/plugins/skinharmony-core",
        "dist/skinharmony-core",
        "reports/core-translator"
      ],
      "server_runtime": [
        "WordPress plugin",
        "Universal Core Render opzionale per decisioni/rami",
        "OpenAI/provider se configurato"
      ],
      "required_docs": ["PROGRAM.md", "ARCHITECTURE.md", "USER_MANUAL.md", "OPERATIONS.md"]
    },
    {
      "id": "universal-core",
      "name": "Universal Core / Core 2.0",
      "path": "SHARED_MEMORY/programs/universal-core",
      "owned_paths": [
        "universal-core",
        "universal-core-2.0",
        "services/universal-core-service",
        "reports/universal-core"
      ],
      "server_runtime": [
        "Render/Core service per tenant e prodotto",
        "Core 2.0 locale per workflow Codex"
      ],
      "required_docs": ["PROGRAM.md", "ARCHITECTURE.md", "USER_MANUAL.md", "OPERATIONS.md"]
    },
    {
      "id": "smartdesk",
      "name": "SkinHarmony Smart Desk",
      "path": "SHARED_MEMORY/programs/smartdesk",
      "owned_paths": [
        "smartdesk",
        "skin-harmony-desktop",
        "render-smartdesk-live",
        "smartdesk-live",
        "services/api-server",
        "services/ai-service",
        "SHARED_MEMORY/programs/smartdesk"
      ],
      "server_runtime": [
        "Desktop app offline-first",
        "Web app/Render live",
        "API server",
        "AI service via backend"
      ],
      "required_docs": ["PROGRAM.md", "ARCHITECTURE.md", "USER_MANUAL.md", "OPERATIONS.md"]
    },
    {
      "id": "core-codex-connector",
      "name": "Core Codex Connector",
      "path": "SHARED_MEMORY/programs/core-codex-connector",
      "owned_paths": [
        "packages/core-codex-connector",
        "runtime/codex-core-workflow",
        "SHARED_MEMORY/programs/core-codex-connector",
        "SHARED_MEMORY/checkpoints",
        "SHARED_MEMORY/reports/codex-orchestrator",
        "scripts/codex_shared_memory_preflight.js",
        "scripts/program_registry_check.js"
      ],
      "server_runtime": [
        "Locale nel workspace",
        "Core 2.0 locale",
        "Core Render solo per prodotto/tenant quando richiesto"
      ],
      "required_docs": ["PROGRAM.md", "ARCHITECTURE.md", "USER_MANUAL.md", "OPERATIONS.md"]
    }
  ]
}
